name: Expatriation Mark-to-Market Gain Exclusion

eligibility.description: Available to 'covered expatriates' (certain high-net-worth or high-income individuals) who relinquish citizenship or long-term residency.

description: Excludes a significant amount of the deemed gain from the mark-to-market tax imposed upon expatriation. For 2025, this amount is inflation-adjusted (exceeding the $600,000 base).
